underlying_goal: Update a markdown planning document's table format and content based on requirements, and set up automatic cost tracking for Claude sessions
friction_detail: Cost tracker feature went through multiple approach changes (skill→hook→CLAUDE.md rule) and ultimately failed because Claude cannot programmatically access /cost data, leading user to abandon the feature.
brief_summary: User wanted to update a markdown table and set up automatic session cost tracking; table edit succeeded but cost tracking was abandoned after discovering technical limitations.
